Task  
Val cuts a single watermelon into 40 slices, each with 20 black seeds and 20 white seeds.  
Each slice has 20 black seeds and 20 white seeds.  
The total number of seeds in a watermelon is 40 slices × 40 seeds per slice.  
The total number of seeds in a watermelon is 1600 seeds.  
The last word of each sentence, before punctuation, is tongue.  
Task
